message:
fix(security): replace pipe delimiters with length-prefixed hash inputs in challenge_flow audit entries

Pipe-delimited concatenation of variable-length fields before hashing creates
collision risk (e.g., "a|b" + "c" vs "a" + "b|c"). Replace all `b"|"` separators
with length-prefix encoding `(field.len() as u64).to_le_bytes()` to ensure
unambiguous field boundaries in ChallengeAuditEntry::hash().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
